snippet.title: Jagame Thandhiram | Teaser | Dhanush, Aishwarya Lekshmi | Karthik Subbaraj | Netflix India
snippet.description:
Podu t̶h̶a̶g̶i̶d̶a̶ ̶t̶h̶a̶g̶i̶d̶a̶ Rakita Rakita. 

Catch Dhanush as Suruli in Jagame Thandhiram, coming soon to Netflix. 

Netflix Presents “Jagame Thandhiram”
A YNOT Studios & Reliance Entertainment Production. 
A Suruli 2019 Film Limited Production.

Starring Dhanush, James Cosmo, Aishwarya Lekshmi, Kalaiyarasan, Joju George and others.

Written & Directed by Karthik Subbaraj

Produced by S. Sashikanth
Co-Produced by Chakravarthy Ramachandra

Music - Santhosh Narayanan
DOP - Shreyaas Krishna
Art Directors - T. Santanam, Vinoth Rajkumar (UK)
Editor - Vivek Harshan
Lyrics : Vivek, Poetu Dhanush, Arivu, Anthony Dasan & Madurai Babaraj
Stunts - Dinesh Subbarayan

Production Executive - Rangaraj
Sound Design - Kunal Rajan
Sound Mix - M R Rajakrishnan

Costumer - Subier

Publicity Stills - V S Anandhakrishna
Stills - Murugan
PRO - Nikkil

Direction Team - Bala, Purushoth, Bharath, Dhakshi, Karthik, Shylam, Vigneswaran, Jagadish, Somitharan, Praveen, Srinivasan & Suresh

snippet.title: Actor Jaggesh Reaction On Actor Darshan Matter
snippet.description:
Actor Jaggesh Reaction On Actor Darshan Matter | ನಟ ದರ್ಶನ್ ಫ್ಯಾನ್ಸ್​ ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ ನಡೆದುಕೊಂಡ ವರ್ತನೆ ಸರಿಯಲ್ಲ : ನಟ ಜಗ್ಗೇಶ್

ನಾನು ನಟ ದರ್ಶನ ಬಗ್ಗೆ ಮಾತನಾಡಿಲ್ಲ. ನನ್ನ ವಿರುದ್ಧ ಷಡ್ಯಂತ್ರ ಮಾಡಿದ್ದಾರೆ. ನಾನು ಮಾತನಾಡಿರುವ ಆಡಿಯೋ ಕಟ್​​ ಮಾಡಿ ವೈರಲ್ ಮಾಡಿದ್ದಾರೆ. ಆದ್ರೂ ನಟ ದರ್ಶನ್ ಫ್ಯಾನ್ಸ್​ ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ ನಡೆದುಕೊಂಡ ವರ್ತನೆ ಸರಿಯಲ್ಲ ಎಂದು ನಟ ಜಗ್ಗೇಶ್ ಹೇಳಿದರು.

snippet.description:
Panghat, a scintillating party number, is sung by Asees Kaur and Divya Kumar. Music is by our favourite duo, Sachin – Jigar and Rap by Mellow D, beautifully penned by Amitabh Bhattacharya. Come be a part of this Bhootiya Shaadi! 

#Roohi #Panghat #Janhvi

Je mann’na ae tan mann ja ve
Nai peke jaani aa

Kahton ni karda care ve
Ronda phirenga fer ve
Gal hun tan meri sunda nai
Karda manmaniyan

Kite russ na jawein dardi aa
Naale aakad teri jardi aa
Rus na jawein dardi aa
Ve naale aakad teri jardi aa
Ve naale jhidkan khaani aa

Dilbar dilan de janiya
Kaaton karein nadaniyan
Je mann’na ae tan mann ja ve
Nai peke jaani aa

Kardi aan pyar main tainu
Chahida kujh nai mainu
Jatti nu nede rakhi ve

Lokaan nu show nai karna
Ladna tan andar ladna
Karke nabede rakhi ve

Haye kade ni pucheya ajj tak 
Teri raat kithe aa langdi ve
Jina tera kardi ohton adha hi aa mangdi ve

Tera mera loon loon channa
Tere nal jud gayi rooh channa
Eh tera mera rishta na kalla jismani aa

Ehde bare tan soch la
Bahon tu fadke rok la
Jo mere andar paldi oh teri nishani aa

Kite russ na jawein dardi aa
Naale aakad teri jardi aa
Rus na jawein dardi aa
Ve naale aakad teri jardi aa
Ve naale jhidkan khaani aa

Dilbar dilan de janiya

Je mann’na ae tan mann ja ve
Nai peke jaani aa

Kahton ni karda care ve
Ronda phirenga fer ve
Gal hun tan meri sunda nai
Karda manmaniyan

Oh manneya tere bol ne vikde
Pyaar naal vi bol kade
Bhaini aale khana kaddke 
Time baith tan kol kade

Jine vi tere yaar ne 
Ajj ton gharon ve bahar ve
Tu pee-pee fulda jana ae 
Main mukdi jani aa

Manneya na thodda sarda ae
Teji vi banda gharda ae
Par mere val vi vekh  
Main kehnda begani aa

Rus na jawein dardi aa
Ve naale aakad teri jardi aa
Ve naale jhidkan khaani aa

Gal hun tan meri sunda nai

snippet.title: Main Sharabi | Teri Khatir Main Duniya Mein Badnam | SR | Rajeev Raja | New Hindi Song | SR Brothers
snippet.description:
SR Brothers Presenting :) A New Heart Touching Love Story Video Song On  "Main Sharabi" (Teri Khatir Main Duniya Mein Badnam ) Song Which Is Beautifully Sung  By "Rajeev Raja & Nizami Brothers" And  Featured By Sachin Rao (SR),Suraj Tiwari & Shikha Tiwari . Chess Is A Recreational And Competitive Board Game Played Between Two Players.  Just like That There Is Always A Competition Between Hero And Villain But Who Pays The Proper Attention, Be  Loyal And Kind Can Win The Battle Of Life . So That's We Are Presenting A Conceptual Revenge Love Story Which Contains Drama, Love Story, Action, Tragedy And Some Thrills.This Video Is Written By Satish & SR , Directed & Produce By Sachin Rao (SR) .'LIKE' if you Love this Video Song.

Follow Us On Instagram :https://www.instagram.com/iam.sr_​​

Main Sharabi | Teri Khatir Main Duniya Mein Badnam | SR | Rajeev Raja | New Hindi Song | SR Brothers | SR & Shikha | Latest New Song 2021

Original Video Credit :
Featuring : Sachin Rao(SR)  Suraj Tiwari & Shikha Tiwari
Cast : Alfaz , Atul , Ravi , Sunny , Ankit
Written By : Satish Rao & Sachin Rao (SR)
Directed & Produce By : Sachin Rao (SR)
D.O.P. , Editor & Di By : Aaditya Jangid
Production Management : Suraj Tiwari
https://www.instagram.com/iam.villain_​​
Asst. Management : Alfaz Shaikh
Choreography By : Noorein Shaikh
Dance Crew : Shikha Tiwari , Noorein Shaikh, Kakul Sharma , Tanshu Shetty
Hairstyle By : Sanjay Gupta 
Makup Artist : Sneha Singh
Poster : PK Editing
1) Special Thanks : Aashish ( For Solving Conclusion )

2) Special Thanks : Prakash Thakur For ( Kyro Club Malad )
                              Kyro Club & Lounge,  Navy Colony, 
                              Kanchpada, Malad West, Mumbai, Maharashtra
                            ( https://g.page/kyro-club-lounge?share )


Song Credits :-
Singer: Rajeev Raja, Faizan Hasan Nizami,  Zeeshan Hasan Nizami
Music: DJ Sheizwood (Ashish Chandra)
Lyrics : Faizan Hasan Nizami and Naim Ansari 
Programming and arranged by : Viplove Rajdeo
vocal recorded at : D18 Studio
Film by: APEKSHA FILMS 
Music Label: Apeksha Music


#MainSharabi​​ #SRBrothers​​ #TereKhatirMainDuniyaMeinBadnam #RajeevRaja ​ #LatestHindiSong2020​​ #MainSharabiSong​​ #SR​​  #RevengeLoveStory​​  #MillionStarSR​


For Buisness Inquiry : Officialsrbrothers@gmail.com

  Enjoy And Stay Connected With Us!!
? Subscribe to my Channel : - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCTXw​​...
? Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/iam.sr_/​​
? Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/RealSRBrothers​​
? Twitter: https://twitter.com/RealSRBrothers​​

Our Additional Videos :
Mere Khudaya 
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DcPRM​​...
Dil Mera Tutata Hi Jaye 
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rsn66​​...
Rab Na Kare ( Joker Love Story )
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TIDKk​​...
Sun Meri Shehzadi
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CgDxS​​...
.
.
.
Thanks For Watching..........Keep Supporting !

Lyrics :

Rajeev Raja-
Jaam Hathon me lene ki Hasrat nahi
Mujhko peene pilane ki fursat nahi
Mai Sharabi nahi mujhko Botal na do
Wo Nazar Se pilaye to me kya karun

 
Faizan Zeeshan-
Main Sharabi sharabi mai sharabi sharabi

Khoob surat ye chehra nigahon me hai
Kya nasha teri qatil adaon me hai
Teri khatir me duniya me badnam hun
Phir bhi tu bhul jaye to me kya karun
 
Main sharabi sharabi…….

Rajeev-
Saqi ne ghol di Jawani sharab me
Kuch nukhs aa gaya purani sharab me
Mujhko to dilli walon ki niyat pe shak hai
Kambakht ne mila diya pani sharab me

Main sharabi..

Faizan Zeeshan-
Ishq ki wardat kuch bhi na thi
Badh gyi bat bat kuch bhi na thi
Mere peene ke hain ye sab jhagde
Mai na peeta to bat kuch bhi na thi

SR Brothers Presenting :) A New Heart Touching Love Story Video Song On  "Main Sharabi" (Teri Khatir Main Duniya Mein Badnam ) Song Which Is Beautifully Sung  By "Rajeev Raja & Nizami Brothers" And  Featured By Sachin Rao (SR),Suraj Tiwari & Shikha Tiwari . Chess Is A Recreational And Competitive Board Game Played Between Two Players. snippet.title: Perseverance Rover’s Descent and Touchdown on Mars (Official NASA Video)
snippet.description:
NASA's Mars 2020 Perseverance mission captured thrilling footage of its rover landing in Mars' Jezero Crater on Feb. 18, 2021.  The real footage in this video was captured by several cameras that are part of the rover's entry, descent, and landing suite. The views include a camera looking down from the spacecraft's descent stage (a kind of rocket-powered jet pack that helps fly the rover to its landing site), a camera on the rover looking up at the descent stage, a camera on the top of the aeroshell (a capsule protecting the rover) looking up at that parachute, and a camera on the bottom of the rover looking down at the Martian surface.
 
The audio embedded in the video comes from the mission control call-outs during entry, descent, and landing. 
 
For more information about Perseverance, visit https://mars.nasa.gov/perseverance
 
Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech

Star Cast : Dhanush , Lal , Yogi Babu , Nataraj (Natty ), Rajisha Vijayan
Director : Mari Selvaraj
Music Composer: Santhosh Narayanan
Producer: Kalaipuli S Thanu
Banner: V Creations
Director Of Photography: Theni Eshwar
Editor: Selva RK
Art Director : Tha Ramalingam
Action Choreography: Dhilip Subbarayan 
Dance Choreography: Sandy
Sound Design : Suren G – S Alagiakoothan
DI Colorist : Prasad and Babu
DI Line Producer: Krishna Rao V
Stills: Amir
Make up : Nellai V Shanmugam – R Raja
Costume : Perumal Selvam
Publicity Design : Kabilan Chellaih
Production Executive: Venkat Arumugam
PRO: Riaz K Ahmed – Diamond Babu

Lyrics animated by - SFTS MEDIA

Lyrics:

Not fathered by the Sun God; 
Nor witnessed by the Moon God; 
Born to a forsaken woman, this child - 
Fed and raised on famine, this child...

(Chorus)
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!

There's the big old Banyan Tree;
Perched upon its tallest branch, 
Though it is all alone -
The lone parakeet sings his name!

(Chorus)
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!

All these countless temples in the village, 
All these countless Gods in the temple, 
And not a single idol of Karnan - 
But he's part of our family! 

(Chorus)
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!

Never laid eyes on any armour (Kavacham);
Never adorned with any ornaments (Kundalam), either;
Would you look how he wields the sword! 
None of his foes survived.

(Chorus)
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!

snippet.title: My First Car - Unveiling with family - Irfan's view
snippet.description:
#FirstCar #SuperCar #Irfansview

I am very much happy to announce you all that I bought my first car. This is the first car in my whole life and it gives me immense pleasure to show you all guys. We went to Route 66 where they sell a pre-owned luxury cars, and we saw many cars there. I decided to get a BMW M3 series as I was much impressed with the car.  I have come this far with all your supports and my hard work. I didn't even know that I will buy a normal car in my life, but the almighty showered his countless blessing on me. I would like to thank each one of you for supporting me. Keep supporting!!!

Boss is a 2013 Indian Hindi-language action-comedy film directed by Anthony D'Souza and written by Sajid-Farhad. It was produced by Cape of Good Films and Ashwin Varde Productions and features Akshay Kumar in the lead role, along with Mithun Chakraborty, Shiv Panditt, Ronit Roy and Aditi Rao Hydari. snippet.title: The LADAKH Tent | World’s 1st Solar Heated Military Tent | Made in India | Sonam Wangchuk
snippet.description:
SOLAR HEATED MILITARY TENT 
for #indianarmy at #galwanvalley
+15 C at 10pm.  Minimum outside last night was -14 C,
Uses only sunlight, water and insulated layers to maintain temperature.
Replaces tons of kerosene fuel, pollution, emission and #climatechange.
Designed for 8 to 10 soldiers, it is fully portable for difficult terrains.  Each part weighs less than 30 Kgs. 
#MadeInIndia #MadeInLadakh #CarbonNeutral

snippet.title: Boss | बॉस | Scene 4 | Boss Ki Entry | Akshay Kumar's Entry | Action Scene | Viacom18 Studios
snippet.description:
Boss is a 2013 Indian Hindi-language action-comedy film directed by Anthony D'Souza and written by Sajid-Farhad. It was produced by Cape of Good Films and Ashwin Varde Productions and features Akshay Kumar in the lead role, along with Mithun Chakraborty, Shiv Panditt, Ronit Roy and Aditi Rao Hydari. It is a remake of the Malayalam film Pokkiri Raja.

snippet.title: Hidden Detailing of Drishyam 2 | Unnoticed Things | Duo media
snippet.description:
Hidden Detailing Of Drishyam 2 | Unnoticed Things | Duo media

Through this video we are presenting Drishyam 2 Movie Hidden Detailing that may gone unnoticed for the common eye


Drishyam 2: The Resumption, or simply Drishyam 2, is a 2021 Indian Malayalam-language drama thriller film written and directed by Jeethu Joseph and produced by Antony Perumbavoor through the company Aashirvad Cinemas. It is a sequel to their 2013 film Drishyam.

Release date: 19 February 2021 (India)

Director: Jeethu Joseph

Producer: Antony Perumbavoor

Cinematography: Satheesh Kurup

Production company: Aashirvad Cinemas


Six years after the events of the Varun missing case, Georgekutty and his family now live an upgraded lifestyle. Georgekutty is much more wealthier than earlier, as he runs a movie theatre in his township and is also planning to produce a film. Their younger daughter Anu has turned 18 and in the final year of schooling in a residential school. His elder daughter Anju is planning for higher studies, while her mother Rani is desperately trying to arrange her marriage. Anju now suffers from occasional epileptic fits, triggered by extreme stress and Rani still lives in worry. While Georgekutty and Anu have moved on, he has also forbidden any discussion about the incident under his roof. The present wealthy status of the family has made the neighbourhood jealous of them, and the townspeople who once sympathised with Georgekutty are now gossiping and propagating fabricated stories destroying the goodwill of the family.

*No copyright infringement intended*
*This video is for Entertainment purposes only*

You can watch Drishyam 2 via Amazon prime video :- https://www.primevideo.com/detail/0PI0IFOE2K9DGDC2N6YOLYBX4O/ref=atv_dp_share_cu_r

snippet.title: Kaka | Dhund Di Khushboo  ▶ਧੁੰਦ ਦੀ ਖੁਸ਼ਬੂ | Adaab Kharoud | Official Video | New Punjabi Song 2021
snippet.description:
They say, “Love is in the air”... It’s time to experience the notion with “Dhund Di Khushboo”❤️
Bringing to you one more melody by your favorite Kaka Ji🎶. 

Song Credits: 
Song: Dhund Di Khushboo
Artist: Kaka, Adaab kharoud
Music Composer and Lyricist: Kaka 
Music Director: Gavin Beats
Video Director: Sukh D
Project conceived and managed by - scope entertainment (https://instagram.com/scope.entertainment?igshid=1l8hzgstsktao)
Casting agency: Medazenith Makers
Photography: Farmer sons
Directed by: Sukh D(instagram.com/iamsukhd)
Special Thanks:  Kimberly The boarding school
Official Radio Partner - 94.3 (MY FM)


#SaregamaMusic​
#Kaka​
#DhundDiKhushboo

Lyrics: 
Dhundh di khushboo adiye ni , 
menu teri yaad dvaundi aa,
Palkaan te kohra jamda aa ,
menu feeling teri aundi aa
Ohh sadak tere pind wali ni, 
dovan da raah padayian da,
Tera hasna nai bhul skda me , 
dil kad lenda c rahiyan da
Tu pedal hi hundi c ,
me cycle te aunda c ,
Science lab vich beh k ni tenu vekh k gaane gaunda c ,
har saal menu chaa chad janda ,
har saal menu chaa chad janda ,
jad sardi kehar kmaundi aa,
palkan te kohra jamda aa ,
menu feeling teri aundi aa,,
ik latt tere mathe nu chum k , 
thodi nu c touch krdi
kahanian varge khaab mere ,
muskaan teri c sach krdi
menu eh mehsoos hunda ,
eh dhundh nahi eh tu hi aa, 
ta hi mere rom rom nu es traah galh laundi aa ,
dhund di khushboo adiye ni, 
menu teri yaad dvaundi aa ,
palkan te kohra jamda aa ,
menu feeling teri aundi aa
ik nazar pehla hi zaalam c ,
kuj surme sun hathyaar tere ,
mere wang hi marde c tere te 2,3 yaar mere ,,
ik nu tu naah kr gayi c ,
kaiyan di himaat mar gyi c jdo menu vekh k ,
has pendi sab kehnde c tenu chaundi aa,,,

Listen the song on; 
Gaana   http://bit.ly/3s4HeJ8
JioSaavn   http://bit.ly/3awVcgU
Wynk    https://wynk.in/u/ZOEtV7A0k
Spotify  http://spoti.fi/2ZtaiOs
Hungama   https://bit.ly/3asEcIW
Amazon Prime Music   https://amzn.to/3pvAEK4
Resso    https://m.resso.app/ZSJJEkJhL/
YT Music   https://bit.ly/2ZplF9R
Apple Music   http://apple.co/3dua1Db



Label:: Saregama India Ltd.

Gokuldham Society members reach Jethalal's house to calm the situation, Jetha gets shocked seeing everyone at his house. About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: Boss | बॉस | Scene 6 | Surya Se Boss Banne Ki Kahani | Akshay Kumar | Mithun C. | Viacom18 Studios
snippet.description:
Boss is a 2013 Indian Hindi-language action-comedy film directed by Anthony D'Souza and written by Sajid-Farhad. It was produced by Cape of Good Films and Ashwin Varde Productions and features Akshay Kumar in the lead role, along with Mithun Chakraborty, Shiv Panditt, Ronit Roy and Aditi Rao Hydari. It is a remake of the Malayalam film Pokkiri Raja.

snippet.title: Petrol Price Hike: 10 మొక్కలు నాటితే ఈ బైక్‌కు రూ.25 వేలు డిస్కౌంట్ వస్తుంది. | BBC Telugu
snippet.description:
పెరుగుతున్న పెట్రోల్ రేట్లకు సరైన సమాధానం భారతీయుడు తయారు చేసిన ఈ బైక్. టెస్లాలో పనిచేసిన ఆయన, ఇప్పుడు భారత్‌లో సొంతంగా సూపర్ బైక్స్ ఉత్పత్తి చేస్తున్నారు. మనం సాధారణ బైక్‌పై పెట్టే పెట్రోల్ ఖర్చును ఈ బైక్ రెండున్నరేళ్లలో తిరిగి ఇచ్చేస్తుందని చెప్తున్నారు. 
#ElectricBike #SportsBike #PetrolRates 
___________ 

నోట్: 'బీబీసీ ఇండియన్ స్పోర్ట్స్‌వుమన్ ఆఫ్ ద ఇయర్' (BBC ISWOTY) అవార్డు ఓటింగ్‌లో పాల్గొనేందుకు ఈ లింక్ క్లిక్ చేయండి. https://bbc.in/3tEyfQq 
___________
ఫేస్‌బుక్, ఇన్‌స్టాగ్రామ్, ట్విటర్‌లలో బీబీసీ తెలుగును ఫాలో అవ్వండి. 

ఫేస్‌బుక్: https://www.facebook.com/BBCnewsTelugu 

ఇన్‌స్టాగ్రామ్: https://www.instagram.com/bbcnewstelugu/ 

ట్విటర్: https://www.instagram.com/bbcnewstelugu/

snippet.description:
Watch the Latest promo of the Tamil Serial #Chithi 2 that airs on Sun TV.

You can now watch your favourite serials Free on Sun NXT. Offer Valid till 25th Feb 2021
 
Watch Chithi 2 Mon-Sat @ 10 PM on Sun TV.

snippet.description:

Infinitum Media presents Thondara Padaku Sundara Vadhana , a rom com featuring Don Pruthvi over a series of love stories through the course of his life. What happens due to his attitude of rushing through life and love forms the series. 

Directed by: Saikumar Netha

Cast : Don Pruthvi, Pravallika Damerla, Kanchan Bamne, Aarif, Prem Ranjith
 
Dop:  Vamsi Srinivas

snippet.title: Surya Web Series || Episode - 1 || Shanmukh Jaswanth || Mounika Reddy || Infinitum Media
snippet.description:
After Software Devloveper, Shannu plays the boy next door in the new series, SURYA. Watch Surya's life unfold with highs, lows and everything in between. This one is for every guy who faces life and its challenges as they come. 

Cast:- Shanmukh Jaswanth, Mounika Reddy, Chandu JC, Murali Krishna, Padma Venkat, Likitha Tejomurthula, Ravi Shiva Teja, Shiva Prasad, Avinash Varma, Revathinadha, Dhana Balla, Hanumantha Rao.

Written & Directed by - Subbu.K

Editor -  Krishna Karthik Vunnava

Cinematography & DI - Vamshi Srinivas 

Sound engineer - Vamsi Vinod Nalli (Nani)

Music - Suman Vankara

Title Animation - Nikhil Concepts

Poster Designer - design Manchu

snippet.title: CHAKRA - Tamil Sneak Peek 2 | Vishal | Shraddha Srinath | Yuvan Shankar Raja | VFF
snippet.description:
Get a glimpse of Vishal starrer "Chakra" on Vishal Film Factory. VFF presents the Team sneak peek of 2 of the mystery/drama film. 

The movie revolves around cybercrime and e-commerce scams in the new digital India. In this short video, Chandru (Vishal) is on a mission to expose such fraud activities as an officer. 

Chandra confronts the heads of the digital world about the customers' data privacy and information security. Watch this intriguing Tamil video snippet, and share your thoughts.

Here's a Tamil sneak peek on the VFF channel that you shouldn't miss! Subscribe to Vishal Film Factory for more updates. 

Chakra movie is coming soon!

snippet.title: Roohi - Official Trailer | Rajkummar Janhvi  Varun | Dinesh Vijan | Mrighdeep Lamba | Hardik Mehta
snippet.description:
From the makers of Stree comes another horror comedy. Iss baar mard ko jyada dard hoga!

Roohi is set in a fictional town of North India. The film revolves around two small-town boys Bhaura and Kattanni who are stuck in a forest with Roohi. But there’s an insidious spirit following them with feet turned backwards. What will happen next? Watch the trailer to know more.

Roohi releases in cinemas on 11th March 2021. A Jio Studios Worldwide release. 

Featuring: Rajkummar Rao, Janhvi Kapoor, Varun Sharma
Directed by: Hardik Mehta
Produced by: Dinesh Vijan & Mrighdeep Singh Lamba
Music by: Sachin-Jigar 

Social Media Links 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/maddockfilms/​ 
Twitter: https://twitter.com/MaddockFilms​
Instagram: https://instagram.com/maddockfilms

#RajkummarRao #JanhviKapoor #VarunSharma #Roohi

snippet.title: RINGTONE - Aroob Khan ft. Riyaz Aly | Anshul Garg | Rajat Nagpal | Vicky Sandhu | Satti Dhillon
snippet.description:
Anshul Garg presents Ringtone sung by Aroob Khan ft. Riyaz Aly .


Stream the full song here :
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/6udoaw1Rsl8kFSOzw62bZ4?si=yZNaMQgIQx2HWpfay818aA&utm_source=whatsapp
Gaana : https://gaana.com/album/ringtone-punjabi-1-2
Wynk: https://wynk.in/music/album/ringtone/bl_3616553054666
ITunes : https://music.apple.com/in/album/ringtone-feat-riyaz-aly-single/1552699452
Apple Music : https://music.apple.com/in/album/ringtone-feat-riyaz-aly-single/1552699452
JioSaavn: https://www.saavn.com/p/album/punjabi/ringtone-2021/efumPpJr4k4_?referrer=svn_source=share&svn_medium=com.whatsapp&utm_source=share&utm_medium=com.whatsapp
Amazon Prime Music : https://music.amazon.in/albums/B08WGGL2NK?trackAsin=B08WH3NJKQ&ref=dm_sh_g9jUvZlt4JXXnldJKL3lYOHEh

Singer - Aroob Khan
Music - Rajat Nagpal
Lyrics - Vicky Sandhu
Recorded @ Studio 504 by Rahul Sharma Assist by Samir Dharap and Euphony Studios 
Guitars & Strokes Shomu Seal
Shehnai Omkar Dhumal 
Tumbi  Vijay Kumar

Featuring - Aroob Khan Ft. Riyaz Aly

Producer - Anshul Garg

Director - Satti Dhillon 
Video Supervisor- Raghav Sharma
Special Thanks : Yatin Kukreja
Dop - Shinda Singh
Project Manager - Piyush Chandak
Editor - Adele Pereira 
Choreographer Sumit kumar
Art director Mr. blacc 
Stylists - Outro by Akshita and Anulika
Assistant Director - Sumit Kumar & Prince Mundi
Colorist - Ercan Kucuk (The Post brothers)
Hairstylist - Harry 
Makeup -  Rajan Passi
Still Photography - Shivam 
Line Producer - Kuldeep Production
Artwork - Vicky Sandhu
Distribution - Believe Digital
Promotions - Underdog Digital 

Lyrics:

Ruseya Hoya Ae Ve Tu Ki Sajjna
Kal Da Lagge Na Mera Jee Sajjna
Kal Da Lagge Na Mera Jee Sajjna,
Kal Da Lagge Na Mera Jee Sajjna,

Ruseya Hoya A Ve Tu Ki Sajna
Kall Da Lagge Na Mera Jee Sajna
Deve Na Jawab Ve Tu Meri Call Da
Main Rova Tenu Disda Hi Nai Sajjna

Sach-Sach Das Ve Kar Hun Bass Ve
Mere Naal Lad-Lad Thakda Hi Nai

Main Tenu Vaar-Vaar Kardi Aan Phone
Wajje Ringtone, Tu Phone Mera Chakda Hi Nai,

Vaar-Vaar Kardi Aan Phone
Wajje Ringtone, Tu Phone Mera Chakda Hi Nai.


Main Hi Kyun Manavaan Har Var Sohneya
Tu Vi Taan Galat Huna Ae,

Subah To Main Sham Tak Takkan Teri Rahwan,
Har Roz Ghar Late Auna Ae,
Har Roz Ghar Late Auna Ae, Roz Ghar Late Auna Ae.

Hoya Ae Bukhar Ve Din Ho Gaye Char Ve
Fer Vi Satauno Mainu Akkda Hi Nai,

Main Tainu Var Var Kardi A Phone
Vajje Ringtone Tu Phone Mera Chakda E Nai,
Var Var Kardi A Phone
Vajje Ringtone Tu Phone Mera Chakda E Nai.



Khore ki ki chlda a mind ch tere jdo Ld pve bolda e nyi
Mrji'an ajkl jyada krda gl dil wali Kholda e nyi
Ravauna a aroob nu 
Jooth bole khoob tu 
Riyaz Ali roop ehe jachda e nai

Main Tainu Var Var Kardi A Phone
Vajje Ringtone Tu Phone Mera Chakda E Nai,
Var Var Kardi A Phone
Vajje Ringtone Tu Phone Mera Chakda E Nai.

#Ringtone #AroobKhan #RiyazAly
